name: Momma’s orc friend [FUTA]
description:
Your mother/ queen sent you, a spoiled royal brat, to her old friend for some sword training!

Don’t expect only metal! Maybe green and hard….?

You are a prince/princess having a training arc with your mothers friend,

Maybe there is a grave danger that will need clenching with your future skills, but who knows?

First time using scripts, im not so sure about it, but i hope it came out well!

creator: FingerFryer
